verdict: Palmer's relies on cocoa butter nostalgia rather than modern hydrating science; while the ingredient is pleasant, it lacks evidence-based actives like ceramides or hyaluronic acid. Value suffers at this price tier.

_research.name: Palmer's Cocoa Butter Body Lotion
pros: Natural cocoa butter provides pleasant sensory experience
Rich texture appeals to very dry skin
_research.con: Outdated formula composition with minimal active ingredients; cocoa butter is occlusive but lacks modern hydrating science.
